title: potentilla hirtella
intro: Potentilla hirtella, also known as Rough-leaved Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Potentilla hirtella include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
